name: Closing Sequence
description: 4-step sequence for deals in the proposal stage

steps.subject: Proposal delivery
steps.description: Deliver the proposal with a clear summary and call-to-action

steps.subject: Check-in on proposal
steps.description: Follow up on the proposal — ask if they have questions

steps.subject: Address objections
steps.description: Proactively address common objections or concerns

steps.subject: Final offer
steps.description: Present a final offer or deadline to encourage commitment
